audience_description: Foundation Representatives (yayasan-appointed liaisons) embedded in Eduversal partner schools. Sit between the school's Academic Leadership Team and the foundation that owns the school. Owns: governance oversight on behalf of yayasan, financial-reporting interface, principal performance review (with yayasan), strategic alignment, and stakeholder management with yayasan board. NOT operational — strategic and oversight-focused.

regulatory_anchors.title: Permendikbud 75/2016 — Komite Sekolah
regulatory_anchors.relevance: Governs the foundation/yayasan relationship with the school.

regulatory_anchors.title: Permendikdasmen 7/2025 — Penugasan Guru sebagai Kepala Sekolah
regulatory_anchors.relevance: Principal appointment regulation — yayasan oversight role.

framework_anchors.cambridge_school_leader_standards_2023: Anchored in ethics & professional norms + meaningful engagement of community.
framework_anchors.principal_appraisal_v1: Foundation Rep co-reviews annual principal appraisal output with yayasan.

priority_levels.compliance: Required by yayasan-school agreement or Indonesian regulation. Non-negotiable.

recurring_tasks.title: Weekly governance pulse review
recurring_tasks.description: Review the school's weekly governance digest from the Academic Coordinator. Flag any items requiring yayasan visibility.

monthly_tasks.title: Monthly yayasan briefing
monthly_tasks.description: Brief the yayasan board on school performance, risks, and strategic items. Use anonymised aggregate data only — no individual teacher data per Section 11.8 transparency rules.

monthly_tasks.title: Attend monthly ALT Dashboard Review
monthly_tasks.description: Sit in on the monthly ALT meeting where Principal + ALT review the leadership dashboard. Foundation Rep participates as observer + strategic advisor.

monthly_tasks.title: Monthly RKAS execution review
monthly_tasks.description: Co-review RKAS execution with Principal and bendahara. Ensure financial stewardship aligns with the yayasan-approved annual plan.

termly_tasks.title: Co-review Quarterly Academic Review (QAR) output with yayasan
termly_tasks.description: After Principal+Coordinator complete QAR, present QAR Findings to yayasan board. Include strategic implications for next quarter.

tasks.title: Co-sign approved RKT/RKAS for the year
tasks.description: Verify alignment with yayasan strategic plan. Co-sign the school's annual operating plan + budget.

tasks.title: Attend Eduversal Annual School Leadership Workshop
tasks.description: All Foundation Reps attend the Eduversal HQ-led annual workshop. Hear network priorities, share school perspectives, align next-year strategy.

tasks.title: Co-attend Sem-1 HQ Specialist visit
tasks.description: Eduversal Specialist visit window. Foundation Rep joins the visit briefing — strategic alignment between school + yayasan + Eduversal HQ.

tasks.title: Sem-1 yayasan board strategic review
tasks.description: Present Sem-1 strategic review to yayasan board: SIP progress, financial position, risks, Sem-2 priorities.

tasks.title: Attend mid-year Eduversal network leadership conference
tasks.description: Mid-year alignment with Eduversal HQ on network direction, EASE I results, principal cohort health.

tasks.title: Co-attend Sem-2 HQ Specialist visit
tasks.description: Sem-2 Specialist visit window. Foundation Rep joins for strategic alignment review.

tasks.title: Co-review annual Principal Appraisal with Eduversal Academic Director
tasks.description: Receive the Principal's annual appraisal output (composite + band + recommendation triplet) per Charter NN5. Co-sign the recommendation. NOT individual rubric items — only the binary triplet.

tasks.title: Annual Report to Yayasan Board
tasks.description: Comprehensive annual report: academic results, financial position, staff matters, infrastructure, strategic outlook. Drives yayasan-school agreement renewal where relevant.

tasks.title: Annual visi-misi review co-leadership
tasks.description: Co-lead annual review of the school's vision, mission, and core values with Principal and yayasan. Confirm continued relevance or propose revision.

extra_tasks_first_12_weeks.title: Quarterly orientation with Eduversal HQ Director
extra_tasks_first_12_weeks.description: First-year Foundation Reps meet quarterly with Eduversal HQ Director (Primary or Secondary, matching school stage) — orientation to network operating model, governance expectations, the four flagged systems (KPI/Appraisal/Competency/Induction).

provenance.framework_sources: Eduversal Network Standards, Cambridge School Leader Standards 2023
provenance.operational_pattern_source: Eduversal-network role definition. Less Semesta-direct than other roles — Foundation Rep is yayasan-side, not academic-side, so Semesta's HoD/Coord patterns adapt only in the strategic-oversight slice.
